text: In Aula 17 you talked about experiences: I have visited many clients abroad.
Today you say how long: I have worked here for twelve years, since 2012.

How long have you worked at Sanofi?
Hi, David. How long have you worked at this company?
I have worked here for twelve years, and I have been a senior manager since 2018.
Nice! What is your background, and what is your field?
My background is in chemistry. The company hired me in 2012 for a junior position.
That is great. How long have you been a senior leader?
For about six years. I have stayed loyal and dedicated to my team since the start.
My background is in chemistry.
I have been dedicated to my team for years.

Good morning, Gleice. Let me tell you my career story. I have worked at this company for twelve years, and I have been a senior manager since 2018. My background is in chemistry, and my main field is commercial strategy. The company hired me as a junior in 2012, and I have learned a new skill every year. I have been very dedicated to my team, and I have stayed loyal to the company for a long time. I have held this position since the last reorganization. So, tell me, Gleice, how long have you worked in your field?

Hello, my name is Renata, and I want to share my career story. I have worked in the pharmaceutical field for fifteen years, and I have lived in São Paulo since 2010. My background is in biology, and the company hired me for a junior position. I have been a senior leader since 2019, and I have built a strong skill in negotiation. I have been loyal and dedicated to my team for many years, and I have grown with the company. I have loved every step of this journey. How long have you been in your current position?

First, David gives a duration with for: I have worked here for twelve years. Then he gives a start point with since: I have been a senior manager since 2018. After that, he describes his background and field: my background is in chemistry, and my field is commercial strategy. Next, he talks about his skills and loyalty: I have learned a new skill every year, and I have stayed loyal to the company. Finally, he asks about your career: how long have you worked in your field?
